one_time_description: Impairment of investment in Young Spirit Supplies written down to nominal value due to uncertainty in recovering carrying value
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprise portfolio including energy resources (Frog Lake Energy Resources Corp and LP), oilfield services, midstream, travel centre, gravel and concrete, ranching, off-reserve housing, and TMX pipeline trust. Also holds minority interests in Seven Lakes Oilfield Services, Pimee Well Servicing, and Treaty Six Carbon Hub. GBEs generated net income of $9,963,047 in 2023.
notes: Audit is qualified due to unrecorded asset retirement obligations per PS 3280. Nation consolidates Morning Sky Health and Wellness Society. 20 business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including energy, oilfield services, ranching, housing, and TMX pipeline interests. Federal Trust Funds of $8,263,566 held by ISC included as financial assets. CMHC replacement reserve of $765,432 is unfunded. Prior year audited by different auditor with unmodified opinion. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text.
